message:
fix(table): read all pages for ALL column types, not just first page

- Fix readInt64Column to read all pages
- Fix readFloat64Column to read all pages
- Fix readInt32Column to read all pages
- Fix readBoolColumn to read all pages
- Fix readStringColumn to read all pages
- Fix getStringColumnBuffers to merge pages with offset adjustment

Previous bug: all column readers only read col_meta.pages[0], missing
data in multi-page Lance files. This affected all benchmarks on large
datasets.
